title: Heavy Engineering and Fabrication Company Dubai
content:
Fabtech International stands among the leading steel fabrication company in UAE and across the globe. With over a decade of experience, we are committed to completing engineering projects of a diverse nature, thereby providing you with the utmost professional service. In addition to being a heavy fabrication company, we render heavy equipment manufacturing solutions to various industries across the region. These include the Industrial and Marine sector, Civil Contractors, Oil & Gas, fuel storage tanks, Onshore and Offshore facilities, and more. As a well-established and certified heavy engineering company accredited by several major institutions, we work together and continuously strive to promote clients' value proposition, backed by our vision of consistent re-investment to deploy world-class facilities.



Over the years, we have built our reputation of being a reliable manufacturing and business partner to EPC contractors and similar end-users through our successful delivery in various manufacturing segments in Dubai and across UAE. Comprised of specialists in the industry, each carrying extensive years of experience, we walk you through the process from the planning stage right through to execution, ensuring you can rely on us at all times. Our comprehensive range of services is high in quality and low on prices, making it suitable for both small-scale and large-sized companies, further promoting economic stability. While our headquarter operates from Dubai, over the years, we have successfully penetrated globally. To avail of our full-service fabrication in Dubai, feel free to reach out to our experts.
